moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Day
moments.blurb: The 2026 Wimbledon Championships conclude today, July 12, with the Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles Finals.

angles.name: Finals excitement
angles.copy: It's Finals Day at Wimbledon! Who will lift the trophies and etch their name into tennis history today in SW19?

angles.name: London buzz
angles.copy: The eyes of the sporting world are on London today as Wimbledon crowns its champions. What a fortnight it's been!

moments.title: FIFA World Cup Semifinals & Final Week
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 heats up this week with the semifinals on July 14-15, followed by the Bronze Final on July 18 and the grand Final on July 19.

angles.name: Road to the Final
angles.copy: World Cup fever is building! This week sees the semifinals and the big one – who are you backing to reach the final?

angles.name: Semifinal showdowns
angles.copy: Only four teams left standing! The World Cup semifinals are just days away. Will there be any upsets?

moments.title: The Open Championship Begins
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship tees off from July 16-19 at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England.

angles.name: Golf Major
angles.copy: Get ready for some major golf! The Open Championship begins this Thursday at Royal Birkdale. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale hosts
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is set to welcome the world's best golfers for The Open Championship. A classic course for a classic tournament!

moments.title: Wireless Festival Cancellation
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival 2026, scheduled for July 10-12 in London, has been cancelled due to headliner Ye being denied entry to the UK.

angles.name: Big festival news
angles.copy: Huge news for festival-goers: Wireless Festival 2026 has been cancelled. Were you planning to go?

angles.name: Visa issues
angles.copy: Ye's visa issues have led to the cancellation of Wireless Festival this weekend. A massive blow for fans!

moments.title: Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival Ends
moments.blurb: The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival in Birmingham concludes today, July 12, after three days of incredible music.

angles.name: Birmingham vibes
angles.copy: That's a wrap for Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul in Birmingham! Who caught some amazing sets this weekend?

angles.name: Festival close
angles.copy: Another fantastic Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival comes to a close today. What were your highlights?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Approaches
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, celebrating its 20th anniversary with music, arts, and comedy.

angles.name: Suffolk festival buzz
angles.copy: Counting down to Latitude! Henham Park will be buzzing with music, arts, and comedy from July 23-26. Who's heading to Suffolk?

angles.name: 20 years of Latitude
angles.copy: It's Latitude's 20th anniversary! Get ready for a huge celebration of music and culture in Henham Park next week.

moments.title: Hayrock Tribute Festival
moments.blurb: The new Hayrock Tribute Festival brings 26 rock, emo, and metal tribute acts to Haydock Park Racecourse from July 24-26.

angles.name: Tribute band heaven
angles.copy: Love a good tribute band? Hayrock Tribute Festival is bringing 26 of them to Haydock Park from July 24-26! Which bands are you hoping to see covered?

angles.name: Rock out next week
angles.copy: Get ready to rock! Hayrock Tribute Festival is just around the corner, celebrating rock, emo, and metal from July 24-26.

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean make chart history
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is the UK's Official Singles Chart Number 1 for a 16th non-consecutive week, making it the longest-running British #1 and equalling Bryan Adams' record for overall second longest.

angles.name: Chart record breakers
angles.copy: History made! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is the longest-running British #1 single ever. What a track!

angles.name: 16 weeks at Number 1
angles.copy: 16 weeks and still going strong! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are dominating the charts. Are you still playing 'Rein Me In' on repeat?

moments.title: Madonna breaks album chart record
moments.blurb: Madonna's new album 'Confessions II' is #1 on the UK Official Albums Chart, making her the first American woman to earn #1 albums over five decades.

angles.name: Queen of Pop reigns
angles.copy: Still making history! Madonna's 'Confessions II' is a UK #1, making her the first American woman with chart-topping albums across five decades. Bow down!

angles.name: Five decades of hits
angles.copy: Five decades of #1 albums! Madonna continues to prove why she's the Queen of Pop. Have you heard 'Confessions II'?

moments.title: UK Heatwave Continues
moments.blurb: A prolonged spell of hot weather continues across the UK, with temperatures reaching into the late 20s and early 30s, expected to last until July 16-17.

angles.name: Sunny spells
angles.copy: Another scorcher for many across the UK! Stay cool and hydrated as the heatwave looks set to continue for a few more days.

angles.name: Keeping cool
angles.copy: It's still very warm out there! What are your top tips for keeping cool during this prolonged spell of summer heat?

moments.title: Liz Mitchell (Boney M.) is 74
moments.blurb: Liz Mitchell, the lead singer of iconic disco group Boney M., celebrates her 74th birthday today, July 12.

angles.name: Disco icon's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to Liz Mitchell, the unforgettable voice of Boney M.! Time to get 'Rivers of Babylon' on loud!

angles.name: Celebrating Liz Mitchell
angles.copy: From 'Daddy Cool' to 'Rasputin', Liz Mitchell gave us so many disco classics. Sending birthday wishes to the Boney M. legend!

moments.title: Gareth Gates is 42
moments.blurb: Singer and Pop Idol runner-up Gareth Gates celebrates his 42nd birthday today, July 12.

angles.name: Pop Idol throwback
angles.copy: Happy 42nd Birthday to Gareth Gates! Remember 'Unchained Melody'? What a voice! What's your favourite Gareth Gates track?

angles.name: Celebrating Gareth
angles.copy: From Pop Idol to stage star, Gareth Gates turns 42 today! Still got those pop pipes. Send him your birthday love!

moments.title: John Petrucci (Dream Theater) is 59
moments.blurb: John Petrucci, the acclaimed guitarist and founding member of progressive metal band Dream Theater, turns 59 today, July 12.

angles.name: Guitar legend's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 59th Birthday to the incredible John Petrucci of Dream Theater! His guitar work is legendary. What's your favourite riff?

angles.name: Prog metal maestro
angles.copy: Celebrating John Petrucci's 59th today! The Dream Theater maestro continues to inspire guitarists worldwide. What's your go-to prog metal track?

moments.title: Dominic Howard (Muse) is 49
moments.blurb: Dominic Howard, the drummer for rock giants Muse, celebrates his 49th birthday today, July 12.

angles.name: Muse drummer's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 49th Birthday to Muse's powerhouse drummer, Dominic Howard! Keeping the beat for some of rock's biggest anthems.

angles.name: Rock drumming legend
angles.copy: Birthday shouts to Dominic Howard! The Muse drummer turns 49 today. What's your favourite Muse track to drum along to?

moments.title: Kasabian's 'Act III' album out July 17
moments.blurb: Kasabian are set to release their new album, 'Act III', this coming Friday, July 17, showcasing their continued evolution with warped electronics and hypnotic grooves.

angles.name: New Kasabian drops
angles.copy: New Kasabian alert! 'Act III' arrives this Friday. Are you ready for their latest evolution?

angles.name: Anticipated release
angles.copy: The wait is almost over for Kasabian fans! 'Act III' is out July 17. What are your expectations for the new sound?

moments.title: Gracie Abrams 'Daughter From Hell' out July 17
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Gracie Abrams releases her highly anticipated new album, 'Daughter From Hell', this Friday, July 17.

angles.name: Gracie Abrams new music
angles.copy: Gracie Abrams fans, get ready! Her new album 'Daughter From Hell' drops this Friday. What are you hoping to hear?

angles.name: Friday album drop
angles.copy: Another big release this Friday: Gracie Abrams' 'Daughter From Hell'. Perfect for your weekend playlist!

moments.title: Geezer Butler (Black Sabbath) is 77
moments.blurb: Terence 'Geezer' Butler, the legendary bassist and lyricist for Black Sabbath, will celebrate his 77th birthday on July 17.

angles.name: Metal legend's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to the iconic Geezer Butler of Black Sabbath on Wednesday! What's your favourite Sabbath riff?

angles.name: Celebrating a pioneer
angles.copy: A true pioneer of heavy metal! Geezer Butler turns 77 this week. His lyrics shaped a genre. Send your birthday wishes!

moments.title: Tom Fletcher (McFly) is 41
moments.blurb: Tom Fletcher, the lead vocalist and guitarist for pop-rock band McFly, will celebrate his 41st birthday on July 17.

angles.name: McFly star's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to McFly's Tom Fletcher this Wednesday! So many great pop-rock anthems. Which is your favourite?

angles.name: Celebrating Tom Fletcher
angles.copy: From chart-topper to children's author, Tom Fletcher turns 41 this week! Send your birthday love to the McFly frontman!

moments.title: Natasha Hamilton (Atomic Kitten) is 44
moments.blurb: Natasha Hamilton, a member of the iconic girl group Atomic Kitten, will celebrate her 44th birthday on July 17.

angles.name: Girl group star's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 44th Birthday to Atomic Kitten's Natasha Hamilton this Wednesday! Get 'Whole Again' on repeat!

angles.name: Celebrating Natasha
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to Natasha Hamilton! The Atomic Kitten star turns 44 this week. What's your favourite AK track?

moments.title: Luke Bryan is 50
moments.blurb: Country music superstar Luke Bryan will celebrate his 50th birthday on July 17.

angles.name: Country icon's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 50th Birthday to country music superstar Luke Bryan this Wednesday! What's your favourite track from the Georgia native?

angles.name: Celebrating Luke
angles.copy: The country hitmaker Luke Bryan turns the big 5-0 this week! Half a century of great music. Send your birthday wishes!
